ip_outcome_note: Card name is 'Mallow', subtype is Supporter, set is Guardians Rising — Mallow is the Grass-type Trial Captain of Akala Island's Lush Jungle in Sun and Moon. Confirmed via Bulbapedia character page and PokemonTCG.io API.

trivia_bullets.text: Guardians Rising (Sun & Moon series, released May 5, 2017) is the second Sun & Moon expansion. Mallow 127/145 is the Uncommon non-holo print; a Full Art (145/145, Megumi Mizutani art) also exists in the same set.

Mallow is the Grass-type Trial Captain of Akala Island's Lush Jungle in Sun and Moon. Her trial involves collecting ingredients for her 'Mallow Special' dish; she works at her family restaurant in Konikoni City. Signature partner: Tsareena (evolved from Steenee during the anime).

Supporter effect: search deck for 2 cards, put both on top in any order. Ken Sugimori illustrated this regular print — uncommon for TCG cards, where Sugimori is better known as the original species character designer.

Mallow is one of three Akala Island Trial Captains alongside Lana (Water-type) and Kiawe (Fire-type). All three appear as Supporters in the Sun & Moon era TCG. Mallow anchors the alola-trial-captains character node.
